description: Style Note arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top is a favourite amongst those who enjoy wearing stylish casual tops. Pair it with jeans and a pair of strappy flat sandals to make a style statement that is in with the current trendsProduct Details Cream tank top with a drawstring tie at the hemline, has a round neckline with a sequins around the neckline, sleeveless and flaring pintucks below the sequinsMaterial and Care 95% viscose and 5% lycra Warm wash with like colours Use non chlorine bleach only when needed Tumble dry Use warm iron  b> Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8"and chest 33") is wearing a size SStyle Note  arrow Woman caters to every fashionista.
